name: Bone Surge
description:
Surround yourself with a whirlwind of bones, gaining a damage shield that absorbs up to 5121 damage for 6 seconds. This ability scales off your Max Health.

An ally near you can activate the Spinal Surge synergy, granting up to 6 allies a damage shield that absorbs up to 30% of their Max Health for 6 seconds and Major Vitality, increasing their healing received and damage shield strength by 12%.
